title: Crispy Spinach & Mozzarella Gnocchi with Brown Butter & Pumpkin
summary: Pumpkin season is back, and this warming crispy pan-fried gnocchi dish is the perfect way to celebrate.

ingredients.label: 2 Packs Rana Spinach and Mozzarella Gnocchi
ingredients.name: La Famiglia Rana Spinach & Mozzarella Filled Pan Fry Gnocchi

method.description: Peel, deseed and chop your pumpkin into small bite-sized pieces then add to a baking tray with a pinch of salt and a drizzle of olive oil. Roast in the oven for 10 mins or until charred and softened, then remove from the oven.
Meanwhile, roughly chop the hazelnuts. When the pumpkin cooking time is up, sprinkle the hazelnuts over the charred pumpkin and return to the oven for another 5 mins.

Heat the butter (or a generous glug of olive oil, if you prefer) in a wide non-stick frying pan set over a medium-high heat. Add the gnocchi and pan-fry for a minute, then add the sage and continue cooking for 3-4 mins or until golden and crispy.
Remove the cooked pumpkin and hazelnuts from the oven and fold them through the gnocchi.
Divide the gnocchi between plates, grate over the pecorino and add a good grind of black pepper before tucking in!

chefs.name: Jordon Ezra King
chefs.summary: Jordon Ezra King is a chef and storyteller. Having cooked, temped, and staged his way through a host of kitchens around the world, Jordon has now set his sights on sharing his knowledge with the world, using his platform to teach people how to work their way around a kitchen and educate them about the provenance of the dishes they're cooking while he does it.
